service.name: Coinbase API
service.description_for_ai: Coinbase cryptocurrency exchange API. Real-time crypto prices, buy/sell crypto, wallet management, payment processing. Most trusted US crypto exchange. Use for crypto price lookup, payment acceptance, portfolio management.

auth.cost: Free for market data. Trading fees: 0.4-1.2%

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get exchange rates for any cryptocurrency vs all major currencies. Free, no API key needed. Use for crypto price lookup.

currency.description: Crypto code: BTC, ETH, SOL, USDT, BNB, XRP

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get current spot price of crypto pair. Simple and clean.

agent_hints.public_endpoints: get_exchange_rates and get_spot_price are completely public — no API key needed.
agent_hints.advanced_trade: For trading use Coinbase Advanced Trade API (separate from this basic API). Requires API key with trading permissions.
agent_hints.precision: Amounts returned as strings to preserve decimal precision. Parse with Decimal library, not float.
